claim: Programmatic tool calling (code mode) reduces tool context usage compared to sequential tool calls where the model receives intermediate results
actionable: Use programmatic tool calling in your agent architecture to reduce context window pressure when coordinating multiple tool invocations
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Large code refactoring projects can be accelerated using AI agents with markdown-based skill definitions and Git worktrees for isolated experimentation
actionable: Structure large refactoring tasks by defining agent skills in markdown and use Git worktrees to test changes in isolation before merging
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Designing codebases that are 'agent-legible' and embracing controlled friction improves agent reasoning and reduces errors
actionable: Write code with clear structure, explicit error handling, and deliberate constraints that guide agent behavior rather than trying to eliminate all friction
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: AI-generated code introduces specific maintenance risks (AI-generated technical debt) that require specialized review and quality gates
actionable: Establish code review processes and quality gates specifically designed to catch and prevent AI-generated technical debt patterns
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Visual orchestration tools enable coordination of multi-agent coding swarms, reducing complexity of managing multiple agents
actionable: Use visual agent orchestration platforms like AgentCraft to compose multi-agent workflows without managing raw agent-to-agent communication
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Gemma 4 family of models from Google DeepMind can run locally in your own infrastructure, enabling on-device inference
actionable: Download and run Gemma 4 models locally for inference rather than relying on cloud-hosted endpoints when latency or privacy is critical
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Ultra-fast inference models (1200+ tokens/second) require developers to shift focus from latency optimization to throughput management and cost efficiency
actionable: When using ultra-fast models, shift optimization focus from latency to throughput management and cost efficiency rather than trying to reduce already-minimal latency
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Multi-day, long-running agent missions require specialized architecture for persistence, recovery, and state management
actionable: When architecting multi-day agent tasks, build in checkpoint/recovery mechanisms and persistent state management to handle interruptions
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: AI can be effectively used to evaluate, debug, and manage other complex AI systems
actionable: Deploy AI agents for observability, error analysis, and automated debugging of other AI systems rather than only using AI for task execution
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Coding agents can generate and optimize CUDA kernels for AI systems engineering tasks
actionable: Use AI coding agents to generate CUDA kernels and custom GPU operations rather than hand-writing low-level optimization code
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Mobile interfaces for agent command and control improve developer experience with long-running agents
actionable: Build mobile-first interfaces for monitoring and controlling long-running agents to improve developer experience and reduce anxiety
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: E2B architecture provides sandboxed execution environments for safely running agent-generated code
actionable: Use E2B or similar sandboxing infrastructure when deploying agents that generate and execute code to safely isolate execution
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Model Context Protocol (MCP) has achieved broad industry adoption among AI engineering platforms and tools
actionable: Adopt MCP as your standard for tool/resource integration in agent systems to ensure compatibility with the broader ecosystem
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more

claim: Embedding agentic capabilities into production multichannel environments requires careful consideration of orchestration and deployment patterns
actionable: When deploying agents across multiple channels (web, mobile, API), use dedicated orchestration platforms to manage complexity and ensure consistency
source_title: AIE Europe Keynotes & Coding Agents ft. Pi, Google Deepmind, Anthropic, Cursor, Linear, & more
